title: First-Line Supervisors of Entertainment and Recreation Workers, Except Gambling Services
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of entertainment and recreation related workers.

tasks.text: Analyze and record personnel or operational data and write related activity reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Apply customer feedback to service improvement efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign work schedules, following work requirements, to ensure quality and timely delivery of service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with staff members to plan or develop programs of events or schedules of activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate the activities of entertainment and recreation related workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Furnish customers with information on events or activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform workers about interests or special needs of specific groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect work areas or operating equipment to ensure conformance to established standards in areas such as cleanliness or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with managers or other supervisors to stay informed of changes affecting workers or operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate workers' appearance and performance to ensure quality service and compliance with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in continuing education to stay abreast of industry trends and developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, or supervise recreational and entertainment activities led by staff, such as sports, aquatics, games, or performing arts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide staff with assistance in performing difficult or complicated duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition supplies and equipment necessary for workers to facilitate recreational or entertainment activities, such as safety harnesses, flash lights, or first aid kits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints regarding worker performance or services rendered.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Serve as a point of contact between managerial staff and leaders of recreational or entertainment activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take disciplinary action to address performance problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train workers in proper operational procedures and functions and explain company policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
